errors.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Only EPUB files are supported.
errors.user_exists: A user with this email already exists
errors.token_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.password_too_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.already_member: You are already a member of this club
errors.not_member: You are not a member of this club
errors.api_key_limit: Maximum number of API keys reached
errors.account_locked: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
errors.memory_book_not_found: Memory book not found. Generate one first.
errors.reset_token_invalid: Reset token is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
errors.reset_link_sent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
errors.password_reset_success: Password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in.

companion.fallback_error: I'm having trouble connecting to my AI service right now. Please try again in a moment.
companion.summary_error: Unable to generate summary right now. Please try again.
companion.explain_error: Unable to explain this passage right now. Please try again.
companion.system_prompt:
You are an AI reading companion helping the user understand "{title}" by {author}.
The user is {progress}% through the book (currently on page {current_page} of {total_pages}).
Be insightful, ask thought-provoking questions, and connect ideas across the text.
Keep responses concise (2-3 paragraphs max).
companion.socratic_prompt:
You are an AI reading companion helping the user understand "{title}" by {author}.
The user is {progress}% through the book (currently on page {current_page} of {total_pages}).

IMPORTANT: You are in SOCRATIC mode. Instead of giving direct answers, guide the user to discover insights themselves:
- Ask probing questions that lead to deeper understanding
- Offer hints and partial observations, not full explanations
- Challenge assumptions and encourage critical thinking
- When the user is stuck, provide a small nudge, not the full answer
- Celebrate when the user reaches an insight on their own
Keep responses concise (2-3 paragraphs max).
companion.annotations_context:
The user has made these recent annotations:
{annotations}
companion.summarize_system: You are a literary analysis assistant.
companion.summarize_instruction: Provide a clear, structured summary with key themes and takeaways.
companion.explain_system: You are a reading companion that helps readers understand difficult passages. Explain clearly with examples.
companion.explain_prompt:
In the context of "{title}" by {author}, explain the following passage:

{text}
